sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after 3rd SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("After 3rd SPACE:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'R', 'N', 'S'):
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  {n['color']}: px={n['pixels']}, r={min_r}-{max_r}, c={min_c}-{max_c}")

# Compare green total
total_green = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"\nTotal green (N): {total_green}")

# Check for sky blue inside the frame area
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'S' and n['pixels'] < 100:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Small S inside: px={n['pixels']}, r={min_r}-{max_r}, c={min_c}-{max_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me trace the green block position across SPACE presses
# to understand the pattern

# Current state summary
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Get white character position
white_char = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 50][0]
wb = white_char['boundary']
w_min_r = min(p[0] for p in wb)
w_max_r = max(p[0] for p in wb)
w_min_c = min(p[1] for p in wb)
w_max_c = max(p[1] for p in wb)
print(f"White char: r={w_min_r}-{w_max_r}, c={w_min_c}-{w_max_c}")

# Get green block inside frame
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] < 50:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Green inside: px={n['pixels']}, r={min_r}-{max_r}, c={min_c}-{max_c}")

# Press SPACE 4 more times to try to fill the frame
action(['SPACE', 'SPACE', 'SPACE', 'SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
